title: Canadian Seafood Chowder
description: A hearty and flavorful Canadian-inspired seafood chowder made with fresh seafood, potatoes, and a hint of garlic.
instructions: Melt the garlicky butter in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the cod fillets, shrimp, and mussels. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the fish stock, potatoes, and Canadian Chowder Mix. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10-12 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley if desired.
